documents.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- Sample 360X Referral Request payload: C-CDA Referral Note (LOINC 57133-1).
     Scenario: Oncology refers a patient for dental clearance prior to head & neck
     radiation. Synthetic patient; real NPIs would be used with synthetic data per
     OHIA test-data rules. Illustrative structure for the reference transformer. -->
<ClinicalDocument xmlns="urn:hl7-org:v3">
  <realmCode code="US"/>
  <typeId root="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3" extension="POCD_HD000040"/>
  <templateId root="2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.22.1.14"/>
  <code code="57133-1" codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.1" displayName="Referral note"/>
  <title>Referral for Dental Clearance Prior to Radiation Therapy</title>
  <effectiveTime value="20260615120000"/>
  <confidentialityCode code="N" codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.5.25"/>

  <recordTarget>
    <patientRole>
      <id root="2.16.840.1.113883.19.5" extension="MRN-558211"/>
      <patient>
        <name><given>Wilma</given><family>Stonewright</family></name>
        <administrativeGenderCode code="F"
            codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.5.1"/>
        <birthTime value="19580312"/>
      </patient>
    </patientRole>
  </recordTarget>

  <author>
    <time value="20260615120000"/>
    <assignedAuthor>
      <id root="2.16.840.1.113883.4.6" extension="1801234567"/>
      <assignedPerson>
        <name><given>Aaron</given><family>Reyes</family></name>
      </assignedPerson>
      <representedOrganization>
        <name>Riverbend Oncology Associates</name>
      </representedOrganization>
    </assignedAuthor>
  </author>

  <component>
    <structuredBody>

      <!-- Reason for referral (LOINC 42349-1) -->
      <component>
        <section>
          <code code="42349-1" codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.1"
                displayName="Reason for referral"/>
          <title>Reason for Referral</title>
          <text>Dental clearance requested prior to initiation of head and neck
                radiation therapy. Please evaluate and remediate any active dental
                disease and provide clearance.</text>
          <entry>
            <observation classCode="OBS" moodCode="EVN">
              <code code="42349-1" codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.1"/>
              <value xsi:type="CD" code="183932001"
                     codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.96"
                     displayName="Procedure requested"
                     xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"/>
            </observation>
          </entry>
        </section>
      </component>

      <!-- Problems (LOINC 11450-4) -->
      <component>
        <section>
          <code code="11450-4" codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.1"
                displayName="Problem list"/>
          <title>Problems</title>
          <text>Malignant neoplasm of the tongue.</text>
          <entry>
            <observation classCode="OBS" moodCode="EVN">
              <code code="55607006" codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.96"
                    displayName="Problem"/>
              <value xsi:type="CD" code="363349007"
                     codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.96"
                     displayName="Malignant tumor of tongue"
                     xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"/>
            </observation>
          </entry>
        </section>
      </component>

      <!-- Medications (LOINC 10160-0) -->
      <component>
        <section>
          <code code="10160-0" codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.1"
                displayName="History of medication use"/>
          <title>Medications</title>
          <text>Ondansetron 8 mg.</text>
          <entry>
            <substanceAdministration classCode="SBADM" moodCode="EVN">
              <consumable>
                <manufacturedProduct>
                  <manufacturedMaterial>
                    <code code="312086" codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.88"
                          displayName="Ondansetron 8 MG Oral Tablet"/>
                  </manufacturedMaterial>
                </manufacturedProduct>
              </consumable>
            </substanceAdministration>
          </entry>
        </section>
      </component>

      <!-- Allergies (LOINC 48765-2) -->
      <component>
        <section>
          <code code="48765-2" codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.1"
                displayName="Allergies and adverse reactions"/>
          <title>Allergies</title>
          <text>Penicillin allergy.</text>
          <entry>
            <observation classCode="OBS" moodCode="EVN">
              <value xsi:type="CD" code="373270004"
                     codeSystem="2.16.840.1.113883.6.96"
                     displayName="Penicillin"
                     xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"/>
            </observation>
          </entry>
        </section>
      </component>

    </structuredBody>
  </component>
</ClinicalDocument>
